$schema-comment: Source of truth for the autogen stub generator. Lifted out of .claude-plugin/plugin.json#slashCommands in v1.0.2 because the modern plugin manifest schema does not accept a `slashCommands` key. Each entry produces commands/<safe-name>.md with YAML frontmatter `description` and the `<!-- coherence-command: <name> -->` sentinel UserPromptSubmit dispatches on.

commands.name: coherence:status
commands.description: Show current coherence state: buffer, recent activity, subagent stats, velocity, cost

commands.name: coherence:review
commands.description: Run the coherence pipeline mid-session against the current buffer

commands.name: coherence:repair
commands.description: Fix anchor collisions, schema drift, buffer corruption, pending.md mismatches

commands.name: coherence:recover
commands.description: Clear quarantine, reset locks, drop progress files, remove auto-disable sentinel

commands.name: coherence:doctor
commands.description: Probe host capabilities and write host-capabilities.json

commands.name: coherence:graduate
commands.description: Toggle between Observe and Graduated mode

commands.name: coherence:enable-sidecars
commands.description: Provision sidecar YAML files for skills/agents when host strips unknown frontmatter

commands.name: coherence:share-metrics
commands.description: Write anonymized metrics to a user-chosen file path

commands.name: coherence:propose-list
commands.description: List queued and surfaced v0.2 proposals (DD-081)

commands.name: coherence:propose-show
commands.description: Show a single proposal by id (DD-081)

commands.name: coherence:propose-accept
commands.description: Accept a proposal and materialise it under .claude/ (DD-082)

commands.name: coherence:propose-reject
commands.description: Reject a surfaced proposal (DD-088)

commands.name: coherence:propose-revert-acceptance
commands.description: Revert an accepted proposal (DD-083)

commands.name: coherence:install-statusline
commands.description: Install the coherence statusline into ~/.claude/settings.json (FR-STATUSLINE-2)

commands.name: coherence:uninstall-statusline
commands.description: Restore the statusline backup created by install-statusline (FR-STATUSLINE-3)

commands.name: coherence:annotate
commands.description: Generate an annotation proposal for an anchor-less doc (DD-069)

commands.name: coherence:scope-debug
commands.description: Print walked CLAUDE.md/coherence/scope.json ancestors and resolved scope for a path (DD-097)

commands.name: coherence:ignore-split
commands.description: Set up the two-file additive ignore model: coherence/ignore (committed) + coherence/ignore.local (gitignored) (DD-096)

commands.name: coherence:export-metrics
commands.description: Write redacted metrics.jsonl to a user-supplied path; prints copy-paste curl only with upload consent (DD-115)

commands.name: coherence:de-annotate
commands.description: Strip auto-annotations or graduate them to user-owned anchors (DD-102/DD-110)

commands.name: coherence:plan-create
commands.description: Create a cross-team plan file under coherence/plans/<branch-sha>/<plan-id>.json (DD-099 amended)

commands.name: coherence:plan-accept
commands.description: Accept a cross-team plan and append an audit-log entry (DD-099 amended)

commands.name: coherence:plan-reject
commands.description: Reject a cross-team plan with a reason (stale | superseded | rejected_explicit)

commands.name: coherence:consent
commands.description: View or update telemetry consent. Flags: --local on|off, --upload on|off, --reset.

commands.name: coherence:audit
commands.description: Bundling-only audit report (free tier) or LLM cross-section consistency pass (--deep, v1.0).

commands.name: coherence:trust
commands.description: View or manage personal + team trust state. Subcommands: --status (default), sync, --promote --auto-land <kinds>, --prune-stale --yes.

commands.name: coherence:metrics
commands.description: Quality metrics report: summary, top drifting sections, trust scores, cost trend, revert hotspots.
